title: Tampa Heat Wave
lead: Tampa is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.46. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tampa is causing extreme temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 14.6 GG. 
The relative humidity is at 46% and wind speed is 5.5 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to this critical weather event.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
